title: Playable Steve Totem
description: Makes totems into a "playable" Steve sprite that responds to keyboard input
body: This resource pack uses the new 1.21.4 item model system to make a totem into a Steve sprite that changes models depending on which keys are pressed! Inspired by Mickey Joe's Barely Default and his keypress dependant models [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mickey-joes-relatively-improved-default](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mickey-joes-relatively-improved-default)
